mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO, PARAM_NO
SELECT * FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1
SELECT * FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO, PARAM_NO
SELECT * FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO, PARAM_NO
SELECT * FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1
SELECT DISTINCT CPNY_ID FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY CPNY_ID
SELECT DISTINCT CODE_NO FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY CODE_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE SY_CODE_PARAM SET CODE_NO = #{codeNo}, CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity} WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM SY_CODE_PARAM WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT c.CODE_NO, c.DESCRIPTION, c.DEPTH, c.PARENT_CODE_NO, c.ORDERNO, c.ACTIVITY, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO, p.PARAM_NO, p.ORDERNO AS PARAM_ORDER_NO, p.ACTIVITY AS PARAM_ACTIVITY, CASE WHEN p.PARAM_NO IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_ASSIGNED FROM SY_CODE c LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CODE_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON c.CODE_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON c.CODE_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON c.CODE_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' LEFT JOIN SY_CODE_PARAM p ON c.CODE_NO = p.CODE_NO AND p.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1
AND c.PARENT_CODE_NO = #{parentCode}
AND (c.PARENT_CODE_NO IS NULL OR c.PARENT_CODE_NO = '')
ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CODE_NO
